info.title: Have I Been Pwned API
info.description: The Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) API provides access to data breach information, paste data, and pwned password checks. It allows querying whether an email address or domain has been compromised in known data breaches, checking passwords against a database of previously exposed credentials, and retrieving stealer log information.

tags.name: Breaches
tags.description: Endpoints for querying data breach information

tags.name: Stealer Logs
tags.description: Endpoints for querying stealer log data (requires Pwned 5+ subscription)

tags.name: Pastes
tags.description: Endpoints for querying paste site data

tags.name: Pwned Passwords
tags.description: Endpoints for checking passwords against known breaches using k-Anonymity

tags.name: Subscription
tags.description: Endpoints for managing and querying subscription status

get.summary: Get all breaches for an account
get.description: Returns a list of all breaches a particular account has been found in. The account is specified by email address. Requires an API key.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: The email address to search for

parameters.name: truncateResponse
parameters.description: When set to false, returns the full breach model

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Filters the result set to only breaches against the specified domain

parameters.name: includeUnverified
parameters.description: When set to false, excludes unverified breaches from the result set

200.description: Breach data found for the account

400.description: Bad request - the account does not comply with an acceptable format

401.description: Unauthorized - the API key provided is not valid

403.description: Forbidden - no user agent has been specified in the request

404.description: Not found - the account could not be found in any breaches

429.description: Too many requests - the rate limit has been exceeded

retry-after.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying

get.summary: Get all breached email addresses for a domain
get.description: Returns all breached email addresses found on a specific domain that has been pre-verified on the HIBP dashboard.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain to search (must be verified on dashboard)

200.description: Breached accounts found for the domain

403.description: Forbidden - domain has not been verified

get.description: Returns a list of all domains the current API key has subscribed to for domain search.

get.summary: Get all breaches in the system
get.description: Returns the details of every breach in the system. Does not require an API key.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Filters the result set to only breaches against the specified domain

parameters.name: isSpamList
parameters.description: Filters by whether the breach is a spam list

get.description: Returns a single breach by its name. Does not require an API key.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the breach to retrieve (stable identifier, e.g. 'Adobe')

get.summary: Get the most recently added breach
get.description: Returns the most recently added breach to the system. Does not require an API key.
Returns an alphabetically sorted list of all data class names. Does not require an API key.

get.summary: Get stealer log domains for an email
get.description: Returns websites that have appeared in stealer logs alongside the specified email address. Requires Pwned 5+ subscription and the email domain must be verified.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address to search (must be on a verified domain)

200.description: List of domains found in stealer logs

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient subscription or unverified domain

get.summary: Get stealer log emails for a website domain
get.description: Returns email addresses found in stealer logs associated with the specified website domain. Requires Pwned 5+ subscription.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The website domain to search (must be verified on dashboard)

200.description: List of email addresses found in stealer logs

get.summary: Get stealer log aliases for an email domain
get.description: Returns aliases and associated website domains found in stealer logs for the specified email domain. Requires Pwned 5+ subscription.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The email domain to search (must be verified on dashboard)

200.description: 2D array of aliases and website domains

get.summary: Get all pastes for an account
get.description: Returns a list of all pastes where the specified email address has been found.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: The email address to search for in paste data

200.description: List of pastes containing the account

get.description: Returns the current subscription status associated with the API key.

apiKey.name: hibp-api-key
apiKey.description: HIBP API key. Required for all authenticated endpoints. Obtain from https://haveibeenpwned.com/API/Key

Name.description: A Pascal-cased name uniquely representing the breach

Title.description: A descriptive title for the breach

Domain.description: The domain of the primary website the breach occurred on

BreachDate.description: The date the breach occurred in ISO 8601 format

AddedDate.description: The date the breach was added to the system

ModifiedDate.description: The date the breach was last modified

PwnCount.description: The total number of accounts in the breach

DataClasses.description: Alphabetically sorted list of data classes in the breach

IsVerified.description: Whether the breach has been verified

IsFabricated.description: Whether the data is likely fabricated

IsSensitive.description: Whether the breach is considered sensitive

IsRetired.description: Whether the breach has been retired

IsSpamList.description: Whether the breach is a spam list

IsMalware.description: Whether the data was sourced from malware

IsSubscriptionFree.description: Whether the breach is available on the free tier

IsStealerLog.description: Whether the data was sourced from info stealer logs

Source.description: The paste service the record was retrieved from (e.g. Pastebin, Pastie)

Id.description: The ID of the paste as given by the paste service

Title.description: The title of the paste, if available

Date.description: The date the paste was posted

EmailCount.description: The number of email addresses found in the paste

SubscriptionName.description: The name of the subscription (e.g. Pwned 1, Pwned 2)

DomainSearchMaxBreachedAccounts.description: Maximum number of breached accounts that can be returned in a domain search

IncludesStealerLogs.description: Whether the subscription includes access to stealer log data

PwnCount.description: Total number of pwned accounts for this domain

PwnCountExcludingSpamLists.description: Pwned accounts excluding spam list entries
